The '''Rendezvous Buoy''' was a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] projection generated by a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Navigation computer/Legends|flight computer]] as a visual reference marker for the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. A type of [[hyperspace navigation buoy]], the Rendezvous Buoy served a variety of functions, and was considered a general-purpose [[Galactic coordinates/Legends|navigational]] aid. Its most common use was, as the name suggests, to mark out [[Backup Rendezvous Point Gamma-Nine|rendezvous points]] for a number of vessels.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
